name: loschmidt_m3
description: Reference density used to convert SI collision coefficients to pressure-normalised rates.

name: W_Ar_dbleStar_to_1s
description: Effective feed-down weight from Ar** into the Ar(4s) precursor family.

name: tau_Ar_dbleStar_ns
description: Effective lifetime of the upper argon cascade.

name: k_Ar_dbleStar_Q_Ar_m3_s
description: Upper-state argon self-quenching coefficient.

name: k_Ar_4s_Q_Ar_m3_s
description: Effective Ar(4s)+Ar cascade coefficient; currently identified with the tabulated Ar**+Ar mean.

name: k_Ar_4s_Q_2Ar_m6_s
description: Ternary excimer-formation coefficient.

name: f_1Sigma
description: Singlet excimer formation fraction.

name: f_3Sigma
description: Triplet excimer formation fraction.

name: tau_S_ns
description: Singlet excimer lifetime.

name: tau_T_ns
description: Triplet excimer lifetime.

name: triplet_weight
description: Nominal prediction includes singlet and triplet; additive quenching suppresses each branch dynamically.

name: scale_Ar2nd
description: Optional global sensitivity scale.

name: anchor_Ar2nd_to_pure_argon
description: Disabled; the absolute yield follows the Degrad populations and kinetic model.

name: Y_Ar2nd_pure_ph_MeV
description: Legacy anchor value retained only for explicit sensitivity studies.

name: reference_pressure_bar
description: Reference pressure used only if the optional legacy anchor is enabled.

name: reference_additive_fraction
description: Reference fraction used only if the optional legacy anchor is enabled.

name: pure_argon_fraction_threshold
description: No numerical pure-argon switch is used.

name: lambda_Ar2nd_nm
description: Central wavelength of the Ar second continuum.

name: fwhm_Ar2nd_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM used to draw the Ar second-continuum band.

name: Br_CF4_D_to_X
description: Effective CF4 ionic VUV branching ratio; retained for spectrum generation.

name: lambda_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Central wavelength of the CF4 ionic VUV branch.

name: fwhm_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM of the CF4 ionic VUV branch.
